description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a dark green camouflage paint scheme and Swedish Air Force roundels on the wings and fuselage. The airplane features a streamlined fuselage, a pointed nose, and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front. Its wings are mid-mounted and swept back, equipped with underwing pylons carrying missiles or fuel tanks. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer with a red marking and a horizontal stabilizer mounted low on the fuselage. The landing gear is partially visible, with the nose gear extended and main gear retracted, indicating a retractable tricycle configuration.
description: A dark green Swedish military jet with swept mid-mounted wings, bubble canopy cockpit, and visible underwing missiles.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and underwing missiles on swept wings.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the single jet exhaust, vertical stabilizer, and Swedish roundels on the wings.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the tail section, swept wings, and the aircraft's streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cockpit, nose, and right wing with visible missile attachment.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with underwing pylons; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and low-mounted horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat, with clear forward visibility.
